task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into the FreeMED application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., logged in as 'admin').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the clinical record for patient Marcus Vance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the patient chart, profile, or search results specifically for 'Marcus Vance'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the interface to add a new laboratory order for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Laboratory Order', 'Lab Test', or similar is open within Marcus Vance's clinical record.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Lipid Panel' test is included in the laboratory order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Lipid Panel' (or related keywords like 'lipid', '80061', 'cholesterol') is visible in the selected tests list or input field of the lab order form.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Hemoglobin A1c' test is included in the laboratory order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Hemoglobin A1c' (or related keywords like 'a1c', 'hemoglobin', '83036') is visible in the selected tests list or input field of the lab order form.

task_completion.description: Verify the laboratory order containing both tests has been saved to the clinical record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message of the saved order is visible, or the completed order appears in Marcus Vance's clinical record/history showing both the Lipid Panel and Hemoglobin A1c.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeMED web interface rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the FreeMED GUI, not a terminal window executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated the FreeMED application rather than typing the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeMED application UI (menus, buttons, patient headers) is visible, not a generic text editor (like nano, vim, or Notepad) with the patient and test names typed out.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the patient record or order confirmation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are not open or being used to modify the page DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Marcus Vance. Required Tests: 'Lipid Panel' (acceptable keywords: lipid, 80061, cholesterol) and 'Hemoglobin A1c' (acceptable keywords: a1c, hemoglobin, 83036). The agent must use the FreeMED GUI to record these tests.
